rkm.project.golfgame

Class PolygonSurface

  • java.lang.Object
    • rkm.project.golfgame.PolygonSurface

  • public class PolygonSurface
extends java.lang.Object
    Polygon interface class (represents all the polygons that make up the golf ground)
    Author:
    RoxaneKM

      Retrieves an array list of triangles (generated from triangulation of the polygon)

        color - colour of the surface polygon

      • pointSeulDansDemiPlan

        public java.lang.Boolean pointSeulDansDemiPlan(Segment seg,
                                               java.util.ArrayList<Point<java.lang.Float>> listOfPoints,
                                               int halfSpace)
        Checks if there's more than 1 point in given half space
        Parameters:
        seg - segment
        listOfPoints - liste of points to check
        halfSpace - integer representing the half space (1 for lower and 2 for upper)
        Returns:
        true if there's no more than 1 point in the given half space, else return false

      • auMoins1PointDemiPlan

        public java.lang.Boolean auMoins1PointDemiPlan(Segment seg,
                                               java.util.ArrayList<Point<java.lang.Float>> listOfPoints,
                                               int halfSpace)
        Check if there's at least one point in the given half space
        Parameters:
        seg - segment
        listOfPoints - list of points
        halfSpace - integer representing the half space (1 for lower and 2 for upper)
        Returns:
        true if there's at least 1 point in the given half space, else returns false
